name: auto-assign
description: Safety net that assigns any still-unowned backlog items to available agents. Primary dispatch happens at backlog grooming (issues are assigned at creation); this low-frequency routine only catches stragglers.

routines.title: Auto-assign unassigned issues
routines.description: Safety-net routine-run checklist (primary assignment happens at backlog grooming, so this usually finds nothing): review any still-unassigned todo issues, assign each actionable item to its best-fit available agent based on role/workload — clear out all stragglers, not one at a time — record evidence and next actions on the routine issue, then exit.
